description.en: A string representing the final path component, excluding the drive and root, if any: >>> PurePosixPath('my/library/setup.py').name 'setup.py' UNC drive names are not considered: >>> PureWindowsPath('//some/share/setup.py').name 'setup.py' >>> PureWindowsPath('//some/share').name ''
